# GitHub Repository Metadata

## Recommended Repository Description

Autonomous AI coding agent built on the Claude Agent SDK. Runs fix-verify loops, decomposes tasks into a DAG, executes them in parallel Git worktrees, and merges results — hands-free. Powered by Claude Code.

_(Character count: 231 — well under the 350-character GitHub limit)_

---

## Rationale

### Description
- Opens with the primary value proposition (autonomous AI coding agent)
- Names the Claude Agent SDK immediately for SDK-aware searchers
- Calls out the three most distinctive technical features: fix-verify loops, DAG execution, Git worktrees
- Ends with "Powered by Claude Code" for brand association
- Uses active, keyword-rich language throughout

### Topics
- `claude-agent-sdk`, `anthropic`, `claude-code` — SDK and brand discoverability
- `llm`, `ai-agent`, `autonomous-coding` — broad AI/LLM category searches
- `agentic-workflow`, `fix-verify-loop` — specific workflow pattern keywords
- `dag-execution`, `parallel-execution`, `git-worktrees` — technical differentiators
- `multi-agent` — growing search category for orchestrated AI systems
- `task-automation`, `code-automation`, `code-quality`, `test-automation` — developer use-case searches
- `python`, `uv` — ecosystem discoverability
- `developer-tools`, `ai-coding-assistant` — tooling category searches
